category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a high-quality GIF encoder based on pngquant; source_facts.homepage points to the official Gifski site.
display_name_sources: Official homepage brand is Gifski; source_facts.name is gifski.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dedicated site; source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub README for additional documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, but source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; GitHub project title and README identify Nike-Inc/gimme-aws-creds as the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GIF encoding and pngquant; source_facts.executables lists the gifski CLI.
